title: Stainless Steel Saucepan with Glass Lid, Mirror-Polished, 20cm Diameter, 3L Capacity, Induction Compatible, Oven Safe, Silver
features: CAPACITY: Large 3-litre saucepan perfect for family cooking, with a 20cm diameter and 10.5cm height for versatile meal preparation.
CONSTRUCTION: Durable stainless steel body with mirror-polished finish ensures excellent heat retention and professional appearance.
COMFORT FEATURES: Silicone-coated handles on pan and lid remain cool during cooking, whilst tempered glass lid includes steam vent for monitoring.
VERSATILITY: Compatible with all hob types including induction, gas, electric, ceramic glass, and halogen cooking surfaces.
CONVENIENCE: Dishwasher and oven safe design backed by a 15-year warranty, offering practical maintenance and long-term reliability.
description: From the manufacturer 5-Piece Pan Set, Stainless Steel Cookware set featuring 3 saucepans with lids (16cm, 18cm, 20cm) and 2 non-stick frying pans (24cm and 28cm) for versatile cooking. Stockpot Stainless Steel, Mirror-Polished Generous 6.5L stockpot perfect for family-sized portions of soups, stews, pasta and batch cooking needs. Robust 24cm stockpot with tempered glass lid featuring steam vent. Stainless Steel 3 Piece Saucepan Set, Mirror-Polished Finish Three versatile saucepans in 16cm, 18cm and 20cm sizes, perfect for all your cooking needs from single portions to family meals.
